scripts.setup: cp app/.env.example app/.env 2>/dev/null || true && cp server/.env.example server/.env 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.secrets:encrypt: node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs encrypt app/.env app/.env.enc && node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs encrypt server/.env server/.env.enc
scripts.secrets:decrypt: node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs decrypt app/.env.enc app/.env && node scripts/secrets-crypto.mjs decrypt server/.env.enc server/.env
scripts.dev: npm run doctor && npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm run ports:free && npm -w server run dev & npm -w app run start:lan & wait
scripts.server: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w server run dev
scripts.server:start: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w server start
scripts.app: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && node scripts/free-ports.mjs 18081 && npm -w app run start:tunnel
scripts.app:tunnel: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && node scripts/free-ports.mjs 18081 && npm -w app run start:tunnel
scripts.app:restart:18081: npm run secrets:auto:ensure && npm run security:env-check && npm -w app run start:restart:18081
scripts.cloudflare:deploy: npm --prefix cloudflare/sports-worker exec wrangler -- deploy --config cloudflare/sports-worker/wrangler.toml
scripts.cloudflare:deploy:dry-run: npm --prefix cloudflare/sports-worker exec wrangler -- deploy --config cloudflare/sports-worker/wrangler.toml --dry-run
